tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
show firewall policy
config firewall policy
    edit 100
        set name "LAN-to-WAN-NAT"
        set uuid f9d90c40-2937-51f1-d69d-ea2eba750bce
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "ALL"
        set nat enable
    next
end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # 
FortiGate-VM64-KVM #

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"FortiGate7.0.14-1","command":"config firewall address
edit UbuntuComputer
set subnet 192.168.1.3 255.255.255.255
next
end
config firewall policy
edit 100
set srcaddr "UbuntuComputer"
next
edit 101
set name "Ubuntu-to-WAN-HTTPS"
set srcintf "port2"
set dstintf "port1"
set action accept
set srcaddr "UbuntuComputer"
set dstaddr "all"
set schedule "always"
set service "HTTPS"
set nat enable
set comments "Allow only HTTPS for UbuntuComputer; default deny blocks other outbound exfiltration"
next
end
show firewall policy"}

config firewall address
